name: Moist Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs, vanilla, salt, and baking soda.
3. Stir in the flour gradually, about 1 cup at a time, then add the remaining 1/3 cup.
4. Fold in the chocolate chips by spoonfuls onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
For best results, use half butter and half margarine.
This recipe yields about 5 dozen cookies. The cookies do not spread out much while baking.
